zh.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: 英國肯特哈德洛福聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Haudlo於大約1250年出生在英國肯特哈德洛福時，他的父親Sir Nicholas de Haudlo27歲，母親Cecily Handlo18歲。他和Mrs. Richard de Haudlo至少有1個兒子。他去世於1286年在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國肯特哈德洛福聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Haudlo was born about 1250, in Hadlow, Kent, England, his father, Sir Nicholas de Haudlo, was 27 and his mother, Cecily Handlo, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard de Haudlo. He died in 1286, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Haudlo est né environ 1250, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas de Haudlo, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cecily Handlo, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard de Haudlo. Il est décédé en 1286, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre.

de.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Haudlo um 1250 in Hadlow, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas de Haudlo 27 und seine Mutter Cecily Handlo 18. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard de Haudlo mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1286 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Haudlo è nato il circa 1250 nel Hadlow, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas de Haudlo, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Handlo, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard de Haudlo. Morì nel 1286, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England.

ja.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: イギリスケントハドロウスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチ
ja.Hadlow, Kent, England: イギリスケントハドロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Haudloが約1250年にイギリスケントハドロウで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas de Haudloは27歳，母Cecily Handloは18歳であった。彼はMrs. Richard de Haudloとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1286年に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスケントハドロウスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Haudlo(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas de Haudlo(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Handlo(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mrs. Richard de Haudlo(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1286년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard de Haudlo. Ele faleceu em 1286, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Haudlo родился около 1250 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas de Haudlo было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Handlo, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard de Haudlo. Он умер в 1286 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, хадлоу, кэнт, Англия.
